rationale.R1.1: The critique identifies the central conceptual issue and proposes a reframing, aligning with the highest anchor.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty about prior benchmarks but could have addressed more points.
rationale.RX.3: Generally within scope with minor drifts into smaller issues.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content; identifies potential harms in the original draft.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major issues but lacks detailed annotations for all changes.
